name: @godrix/mcp-argocd
description: MCP Server for Argo CD: multi-environment profiles, SSO login, application search cache, and REST API tools.

argocd_url.title: Argo CD URL (single instance)
argocd_url.description: Use alone for one Argo CD. Do not set together with Profiles + URL profiles.

argocd_default_profile.title: Default profile name
argocd_default_profile.description: Required for multi-env mode (e.g. qa). Must match an entry in Profiles.

argocd_profiles.title: Profile names (multi-env)
argocd_profiles.description: Comma-separated names, e.g. qa,stg,prod. Requires Default profile + URL profiles.

argocd_url_profiles.title: Profile URLs (multi-env)
argocd_url_profiles.description: Comma-separated URLs in the same order as Profiles.

argocd_api_key.title: API key / token
argocd_api_key.description: Bearer token from Argo CD UI or argocd account generate-token. Alternative to SSO login.

argocd_read_only.title: Read-only mode
argocd_read_only.description: When true, blocks sync and other mutations.
